overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, and vibrant red and blue neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the plaza toward an intersection, wearing a backpack with mechanical components

entered.detail: Massive screen displaying animated food advertisement on building facade
Sleek black vehicle with illuminated accents parked at curb
Rain-slicked tiles reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza at night, with a massive digital billboard displaying advertisements on the left and a futuristic parked car on the right. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding skyscrapers.

events.description: character steps from plaza onto street crosswalk
character turns slightly left while continuing forward toward red neon structure

agents.ego_description: character crossing the street intersection while heading toward a large red neon installation in the distance

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection in the distance

entered.detail: Tall vertical structure emitting bright red light
Yellow painted lines marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a city intersection marked with yellow crosswalk lines, moving toward a prominent red neon pillar structure ahead. A futuristic vehicle drives past in the distance on the left as the character navigates the turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital ceiling

events.description: character enters covered walkway passing the red neon structure
digital ceiling with animated advertisements becomes visible overhead

agents.ego_description: character walking through covered arcade-like walkway passing benches with seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench wearing red jacket

entered.detail: Overhead structure with digital display panels showing advertisements
Concrete seating with people resting along the right side
Tall palm tree visible at end of walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway, passing the red neon pillar on the left and benches with seated NPCs on the right. The digital ceiling becomes visible overhead displaying animated advertisements, while a palm tree stands at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with massive digital ceiling display

events.description: ceiling display changes to show large text 'WHEN YOU ARE HIGH' with face imagery
camera tilts upward to focus on the digital ceiling display

agents.ego_description: character continuing forward while looking up at the massive digital ceiling display

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the palm tree

entered.detail: Massive overhead screen displaying 'WHEN YOU ARE HIGH' text and portrait imagery
Shop entrance with bright signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the covered plaza beneath a massive digital ceiling that displays 'WHEN YOU ARE HIGH' in large letters. The camera tilts upward to capture the immersive overhead display while the character approaches the palm tree and other pedestrians visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit urban plaza into a sheltered pedestrian corridor beneath a massive digital ceiling. It begins with the character walking across wet, reflective pavement past a towering digital billboard and a parked futuristic car. As the character crosses a yellow-marked intersection, the view shifts toward a prominent red neon pillar while a vehicle glides past in the distance. The scene then transitions into a covered walkway, passing the red pillar and seated pedestrians before the environment closes in under an animated overhead display. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the words WHEN YOU ARE HIGH across the digital ceiling as the character approaches a lone palm tree and a crowd of pedestrians.
